name: Common Trust Fund Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Must be a fund maintained by a bank exclusively for collective investment of moneys contributed in a fiduciary capacity (trustee, executor, etc.) in conformity with banking regulations.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A common trust fund is not subject to federal income tax and is not treated as a corporation; instead, income and losses flow through to participants.
